Title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Rank - ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Cargo Haul
Description:
Hey,

The refinery at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> has been busy. They’ve processed a mix of refined ores and are looking to get the containers (<EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> or smaller) shipped out from a freight elevator. I just checked with the LEOs to see where this stuff is needed and was able to put together this run.  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

Should be an easy run for you, if you’re free. 

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
DisplayDescription:
Hey,

The refinery at <EM4>[Location|Address]</EM4> has been busy. They’ve processed a mix of refined ores and are looking to get the containers (<EM4>16 SCU</EM4> or smaller) shipped out from a freight elevator. I just checked with the LEOs to see where this stuff is needed and was able to put together this run.  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[Destination|Address]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[Destination1|Address]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[Destination2|Address]</EM4>

Should be an easy run for you, if you’re free. 

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

[Contractor|SignOff]

Chase Hewitt
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[Destination|Address]</EM4>

And as the poster on my wall says, 'Bee Safe, Honey!'
Can't wait to hear how everything goes,
I'm rooting for you. Make me proud!
